notes.quality_assessment: Unusable. Two Hessian approaches tested: (a) pre-captured Hessians caused activation explosion (7.8x at block 2 to 314x at block 10), PPL 21,425 for 10 quantized blocks + 6 FP16; (b) actual-layer-input Hessians caused activation collapse (50x below baseline), PPL 881,014 for all 16 blocks.
notes.root_cause: Binary factorization at bpw=0.80 with 50 ADMM iterations lacks sufficient approximation capacity for OLMoE weight matrices. Error compounds multiplicatively through 16 blocks.
notes.pipeline_status: End-to-end pipeline mechanically works: Hessian capture, ADMM block-wise reconstruction, checkpoint save, model reconstruction, WikiText-2 PPL eval. No blocking code bugs.
notes.float16_cpu_warning: Float16 matmuls on CPU produce NaN. Eval must use float32 on CPU or float16 on CUDA.
bug_fixes_applied: nanoquant/quantize.py: clamp non-finite block output instead of raise RuntimeError
scripts/recover_checkpoint.py: new script to rebuild factors from block checkpoints
Hessian fix attempted and reverted (activation collapse worse than explosion)
